# Firewall Allowlist for Copilot Agents

If your agent runs behind a restrictive firewall, allow these hosts. Always check the official guidance for updates.

```plaintext
agents.md
aka.ms
ansible.com
api.github.com
archive.ubuntu.com
cache.nixos.org
cdn.mql5.com
channels.nixos.org
code.visualstudio.com
codeload.github.com
contributor-covenant.org
dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org
dl.winehq.org
download.mql5.com
files.pythonhosted.org
freecodecamp.org
galaxy.ansible.com
gh.io
ghcr.io
github.com
guides.github.com
hashicorp.com
img.shields.io
marketplace.visualstudio.com
mt5-trade.metaquotes.net
npm.pkg.github.com
objects.githubusercontent.com
pkg-containers.githubusercontent.com
pypi.org
raw.githubusercontent.com
registry.npmjs.org
releases.nixos.org
support.github.com
tldrlegal.com
trade.mql5.com
uploads.github.com
user-images.githubusercontent.com
web.archive.org
www.mql5.com
yaml-multiline.info
```

Note: Keep the list sorted alphabetically for easier maintenance.

Reference: <https://gh.io/copilot/firewall-config>
